massdig.screen.title: MassDig Settings
massdig.screen.subtitle: Fast digging and radius digging are separate.
massdig.mode.safe.name: Careful
massdig.mode.safe.hint: Best for servers and deepslate. Slow, but safest.
massdig.mode.balanced.name: Normal
massdig.mode.balanced.hint: Recommended. Breaks steadily and keeps packets moderate.
massdig.mode.fast.name: More packets
massdig.mode.fast.hint: More packets for faster area work. Use only if the server accepts it.
massdig.mode.legacy_burst.name: Old burst
massdig.mode.legacy_burst.hint: Old quick style. Good for soft blocks, bad for strict servers.
massdig.shape.plane.name: Wall
massdig.shape.plane.hint: Mines one flat wall/floor layer around the aimed block.
massdig.shape.tunnel.name: Tunnel
massdig.shape.tunnel.hint: Mines a flat opening and continues inward.
massdig.shape.cube.name: Cube
massdig.shape.cube.hint: Mines blocks around the aimed block in every direction. Heavy on large radius.
massdig.preset.server.name: Server
massdig.preset.normal.name: Normal
massdig.preset.deepslate.name: Deepslate
massdig.preset.soft_blocks.name: Soft blocks
massdig.tooltip.enabled: Turns the drill on or off.
massdig.tooltip.fast_mining: Separate feature. Removes the small client delay between mined blocks.
massdig.tooltip.radius_enabled: Separate feature. Mines an area around the block you are breaking.
massdig.tooltip.preview: Shows which radius blocks MassDig will try to mine.
massdig.tooltip.preset: Cycles a full set of settings. Good when you want one simple choice.
massdig.tooltip.radius: How far from the aimed block. Maximum is 6.
massdig.tooltip.packet_limit: Lower is safer. If you get packet kicks, lower this or use Careful mode.
massdig.tooltip.safety: Extra waiting time before finishing hard blocks like deepslate.
massdig.tooltip.legacy_blocks: Only affects Old burst mode. Lower is safer.
massdig.tooltip.hard_first: Tries tough blocks early, so deepslate does not get left behind.
massdig.tooltip.auto_slowdown: If blocks do not break, MassDig temporarily slows itself down and waits longer.
massdig.tooltip.skip_unbreakable: Avoids bedrock-like blocks that cannot be mined.
massdig.tooltip.keep_within_reach: Skips radius blocks that are probably too far for the server to accept.
massdig.tooltip.same_block_only: Only mines blocks matching the aimed block. Leave off for mixed stone, dirt, and deepslate.
massdig.tooltip.remove_cooldown: Now lives in the separate Fast digging mode.
massdig.tooltip.reset: Returns settings to the Normal preset.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.massdig: Breaks an area around the block you mine, with server-friendly modes and hard block handling.
